name: Vast Bank, National Association
description_short: Vast Bank, N.A. is a National Association bank offering FDIC-insured checking, savings, CDs, and personal/business loans with locations in Tulsa, Oklahoma.
description_long:
Vast Bank, National Association is a federally-chartered bank operating in Oklahoma with a primary focus on customer service. The bank maintains its headquarters in Tulsa with multiple branch locations throughout the area, positioning itself as a community-oriented financial institution. Vast Bank emphasizes personalized customer service and deposit protection through FDIC insurance coverage.

The bank offers a comprehensive range of retail banking products including Rewards Checking accounts with high interest rates, Platinum Savings accounts, Certificate of Deposit (CD) products with seasonal rate promotions, and personal loans. Additionally, Vast Bank provides business lending services and has introduced Vast Deposit Protect Plus, which advertises up to $50 million in FDIC insurance coverage combined with daily liquidity and competitive yields. Online account opening functionality is noted as "coming soon" on their website.

Vast Bank distinguishes itself through its emphasis on local presence and customer accessibility, maintaining branch locations with both lobby and drive-up services in most locations. The bank actively communicates with customers regarding service disruptions, as evidenced by their transparent messaging about the temporary closure of their Utica Square location due to facility repairs expected to complete in Spring 2026. They provide multiple contact channels including phone support and email for customer service inquiries.

However, prospective customers should note that Vast Bank currently has limited branch availability, with only three fully operational locations in the Tulsa metropolitan area, plus one temporarily closed location. Their website indicates that online account opening is still under development. The bank's service area appears geographically limited to Oklahoma, which may restrict accessibility for customers outside this region. Many banks offer installment loans with fixed monthly payments, giving borrowers a clear payoff timeline.
services: Rewards Checking accounts with high-interest rates
Certificate of Deposit (CD) products with seasonal promotions
Vast Deposit Protect Plus (up to $50 million FDIC insurance with daily liquidity)
Debit card issuance and lost/stolen card reporting
pros: FDIC-insured deposits backed by full faith and credit of the U.S. Government
High-interest Rewards Checking account option with competitive rates
Vast Deposit Protect Plus offers up to $50 million in FDIC insurance coverage
Multiple service channels including drive-up banking at most locations (except Downtown Tulsa)
Personal and business lending products available in addition to deposit accounts
Transparent communication about service disruptions and branch status
Routing number 103902717 and lost card reporting available 24/7 at (800) 754-4128
cons: Limited branch network with only 3 fully operational locations in Tulsa area; one location closed until Spring 2026
Online account opening not yet available (listed as 'coming soon' on website)
Geographic service area appears limited to Oklahoma, restricting access for out-of-state customers
Downtown Tulsa branch lacks drive-up service with lobby-only hours
Recent scam activity targeting business customers indicates potential security concerns in customer communication
best_for: Tulsa-area residents and businesses seeking community bank relationships with in-person service
Customers prioritizing FDIC insurance protection and high-yield savings/checking products
Small business owners seeking local lending relationships and business banking services
Depositors interested in CD rate specials and premium savings account products
diagnosis: Vast Bank is best suited for customers in the Tulsa, Oklahoma area who value local banking relationships, FDIC-insured products, and competitive deposit rates. The primary caveat is their limited geographic footprint and ongoing development of online account opening capabilities, which may restrict accessibility for remote or out-of-state customers seeking fully digital banking.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
